title: GloveCraft Cobblemon Tycoon
body:
![Title1](https://i.imgur.com/VQMcSjn.png)
🧤 GloveCraft: Cobblemon Tycoon

🌿 “The player makes the story.” 🌿

GloveCraft: Cobblemon Tycoon is a creative adventure modpack that blends the excitement of Cobblemon exploration with the creativity and freedom of Tycoon-style building. Inspired by Zoo Tycoon and Planet Zoo, this pack challenges players to craft their own story, where every capture, structure, and habitat has purpose.

✨ What Makes It Special

🦊 Cobblemon & Custom Creatures!
Catch, train, and care for a wide range of Cobblemon alongside custom creatures from across the world. From mythical Pokémon to realistic wildlife, each one can become part of your zoo, sanctuary, or research facility — the choice is yours.

🌎 A Living, Breathing World!
With enhanced biomes, dynamic environments, and natural ecosystems, every build comes alive. Habitats react to temperature, vegetation, and water — just like in real life. Create balanced enclosures, thriving environments, and fully functional ecosystems that your creatures depend on.

🏠 Every Build Counts (and Works)!
In GloveCraft: Cobblemon Tycoon, every structure functions just like it would in real life — from realistic animal habitats and breeding centers to working exhibits and themed visitor areas. Your creativity doesn’t just look good — it matters to how your world thrives.

💡 The Player Makes the Story
There’s no fixed path — you decide how your journey unfolds. Become a breeder, caretaker, researcher, or tycoon building a sprawling wildlife empire. Every design choice, every captured creature, every working build adds to your evolving story.
![Title2](https://i.imgur.com/c7WQRP9.png)
